items.notes: Smart batteries (with BMS), smart chargers, MPPTs, and power distribution boards for UAS. Also building a battery cell manufacturing plant.

products_categories.notes: Fleet Management Software (battery fleet tracking) is battery-ecosystem software, grouped under power_systems. Skipped product pages may reveal additional categories.

evidence.snippet:
#### We design, test, and manufacture smart batteries and power systems for cutting-edge UAS platforms around the world
We work closely with our customers to understand their requirements, and we are able to develop high-performance batteries that extend flight times, even with increased payloads, and offer simple, reliable operation over a longer lifetime.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures smart batteries, chargers, MPPTs, and power electronics specifically for UAS platforms. Batteries are explicitly a component_supplier product per the rubric.

products.notes: Smart Batteries, Smart Chargers, and Fleet Management Software product pages were skipped (class budget exhausted); product SKU details unknown.

ndaa.notes: Homepage shows 'Manufactured in the USA' and a 'Certifications & Compliance' section with an image banner (CertBanner), but no NDAA/889 text is extractable from the corpus. Domestic manufacture is emphasized heavily.

evidence.snippet: FARGO, N.D. (Feb. 2, 2024) — Packet Digital, a leading provider of batteries and charging systems for autonomous systems, announced the opening of its second facility, a 25,000-square-foot manufacturing plant in Fargo, N.D. The facility will enable Packet Digital to significantly increase production capacity to meet growing demands for its innovative products. The ribbon-cutting ceremony \[…\]

FARGO, N.D. (April 8, 2026) — Packet Digital, a leading unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) and autonomous battery cell and pack manufacturer, announced that it has been awarded a $27 million contract by the Naval Air Warfare Center Aircraft Division to scale domestic manufacturing of battery cells.

readiness.notes: 25,000 sq ft manufacturing facility opened Feb 2024; volume production of battery packs and PCBs; $27M Phase III Navy SBIR for battery cell manufacturing scale-up; 80,000 sq ft cell plant under construction.

tagline: Fargo-based designer and manufacturer of smart battery packs, power distribution boards, and solar MPPTs for UAS platforms. Products include DroneCAN-enabled smart batteries with cell-level BMS, 200 A power distribution boards, and buck-boost solar trackers (MPPT-6SBB, MPPT-12SBB). US domestic manufacturing claimed; NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed. Recent $27M Naval contract for battery cell manufacturing scale-up. Public technical depth limited; independent performance validation sparse.
